channel.title: X Feed Transfer Generated Posts
channel.description: Generated X-ready posts produced from source articles

item.title: Ray 2.55 fixes downtime zombies in MoE AI infra—DP groups fail-safe, not the whole cluster. 🚀 https://Blockchain.News/news/ray-255-fault-tolerance-vllm-wideep-deployments #ai #rayserve #deeplearning
item.description: Ray 2.55 fixes downtime zombies in MoE AI infra—DP groups fail-safe, not the whole cluster. 🚀 https://Blockchain.News/news/ray-255-fault-tolerance-vllm-wideep-deployments #ai #rayserve #deeplearning

item.title: Open-weight AI just slashes cost without losing bite. GLM-5 and MiniMax M2.7 rival Claude/GPT on agent tasks at ~1/10th the price. 🚀 https://Blockchain.News/news/open-ai-models-match-frontier-performance-lower-cost #AI #OpenModels #LangChain
item.description: Open-weight AI just slashes cost without losing bite. GLM-5 and MiniMax M2.7 rival Claude/GPT on agent tasks at ~1/10th the price. 🚀 https://Blockchain.News/news/open-ai-models-match-frontier-performance-lower-cost #AI #OpenModels #LangChain

item.title: Binance backs Ukraine’s Web3 push with a $500K Digital Resilience Lab—tangible support, real infrastructure, real risk. 🔥 Explore what this collaboration aims to build... https://Blockchain.News/news/binance-ukraine-digital-resilience-lab-500k-web3 #Web3 #Ukraine #Crypto
